title: Quality Client
description: Bring together a collection of client-side mods focused on enhancing performance and quality of life. This pack ensures a smooth, immersive, and enjoyable gameplay experience without affecting server performance.
body:
# Quality Client
## Overview

The EssentialClient Modpack for Minecraft brings together a curated collection of client-side mods focused on enhancing performance and quality of life. This pack ensures a smooth, immersive, and enjoyable gameplay experience without affecting server performance. Works in Minecraft 1.21. Requires FabricAPI.

## Features
### Performance Boosters
- Sodium: Optimizes rendering performance.
- Krypton: Enhances network performance for smoother gameplay.
- Iris: Adds shader support for stunning visuals without sacrificing performance.
### Quality of Life Enhancements
- Just Enough Items (JEI): Simplifies crafting by displaying recipes.
- Mouse Tweaks: Improves inventory management with additional mouse functionalities.
- InvMove: Allows movement while browsing inventories.
### Immersive Additions
- Ambient Sounds: Enhances the game atmosphere with realistic sound effects.
- Falling Leaves: Adds falling leaves for a more immersive environment.
- Presence Footsteps: Introduces varied footstep sounds based on terrain.
### GUI Improvements
- Appleskins: Provides additional hunger and saturation information.
- Essential: Offers community and social features to enhance multiplayer interactions.
### Rendering Enhancements
- Bobby: Increases render distances for better world visibility.
### Resource Management
- Resourcify: Easily manage and add resource packs and shader packs.

## Bundled Resource Packs
- GUI Revision or Default Dark Mode: Customizable GUI themes.
- Eyeless Fresh Moves: Enhances mob animations for more dynamic interactions.
(Tip - Turn ON Prevent first person hand animations in EFM Settings -> Models -> Player settings
- FreshAnimations: Provides detailed and smooth animations for mobs.
## Bundled Shader Packs
- OpenShad Alpha v2
- Rethinking Voxels

You can always disable Resource Packs or Shader Packs or download different ones using Resourcify.

## Usage
### Performance and Quality of Life
- Enjoy a smoother gameplay experience with optimized performance and enhanced visuals.
- Utilize quality of life mods for better inventory management, crafting, and movement.
### Immersive Experience
- Dive into a more atmospheric and engaging game world with enhanced sounds, visuals, and animations.
### Customization
- Easily manage and add resource packs and shader packs to tailor your game to your preferences.
  
Enjoy a seamless and enhanced Minecraft experience with the EssentialClient Modpack!
